title: cyclobalanopsis fleuryi
intro: Cyclobalanopsis fleuryi, also known as the Chinese sweet chestnut, is a species of deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, the bark and leaves of this plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis fleuryi include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting digestive health. Cyclobalanopsis fleuryi is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations also including capsules and extracts for convenience and standardized dosing.
